sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Some fragrances feel fresh. Some feel rich. And then there are scents that instantly create a presence. Oud Cinnamon Parfum is made for that moment when you want your fragrance to feel warm, confident, and slightly mysterious without being too loud.

It opens with the spicy warmth of cinnamon, giving the perfume a bold first impression. As it settles, the depth of oud comes forward—smooth, woody, and rich. Together, they create a scent that feels premium, long-lasting, and easy to remember.

This parfum is perfect for evenings, special plans, festive moments, or days when you simply want to feel more put-together. It carries a warm trail that stays close yet noticeable, making it suitable for both men and women who enjoy deep, elegant fragrances.

Why You'll Love It 😍

-> Warm Cinnamon Spice

-> Deep Oud Character

-> Designed to stay with you for hours

-> Unisex Fragrance

-> Premium Feel

It’s the finishing touch that makes your presence feel stronger—and Oud Cinnamon Parfum does it perfectly.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
Product Type: Parfum

Fragrance Family: Oud, Woody, Spicy

Main Notes: Oud & Cinnamon

Wear Time: Long-lasting fragrance

Suitable For: Men & Women

Best For: Evenings, parties, festive occasions, date nights, and daily confidence

Feel: Warm, bold, rich, and premium

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
Top Note: Tobacco Leaf, Spicy Notes, Cinnamon

Middle Note: Vanilla, Cacao, Tonka Bean, Tobacco Blossom

Base Note: Dried Fruits, Woody Notes

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
🔥 Warm & Bold Fragrance

Cinnamon adds a spicy, confident opening that instantly creates a strong first impression.

🌲 Rich Oud Depth

Oud gives the parfum a deep, woody, premium character that feels elegant and memorable.

⏳ Long-Lasting Scent

Designed to stay for hours, making it suitable for both daily wear and special occasions.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Unisex Appeal

A balanced fragrance profile that suits both men and women who love warm woody scents.

✨ Enhances Your Presence

Adds a polished finishing touch to your overall personality and style.

🌙 Perfect for Evenings & Events

Its warm spicy profile makes it ideal for parties, dinners, festive moments, and date nights.
